events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Pittsburgh Steelers

headlines.description: — Andy Reid donned a Santa Claus suit in a giddy Kansas City Chiefs locker room on Christmas Day, then handed his team a present it increasingly looks like it deserves: home-field...
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahomes throws 3 TDs as Chiefs clinch AFC's top seed by breezing past the skidding Steelers 29-10

headlines.description: — Lamar Jackson broke the NFL career rushing record for quarterbacks in the Baltimore Ravens' victory over the Houston Texans on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lamar Jackson breaks NFL QB rushing record, accounts for 3 TDs in Ravens' 31-2 romp over Texans

headlines.description: — The Seattle Seahawks made just enough plays to boost their fading playoff hopes by beating the struggling Chicago Bears on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Woolen's late interception seals win as Seahawks beat struggling Bears 6-3 to boost playoff hopes

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — As spontaneous celebrations rippled throughout the Los Angeles Chargers' locker room after their resounding 40-7 win over the New England Patriots, coach Jim Harbaugh grabbed...
headlines.shortLinkText: Herbert tosses 3 TD passes and Chargers secure a playoff spot with a 40-7 rout of Patriots

headlines.description: — This time, near the very end of a mostly agonizing season, the Cincinnati Bengals made enough plays to win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow throws 3-yard TD pass to Higgins in OT as the Bengals beat the Broncos 30-24

events.name: Arizona Cardinals at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — The Los Angeles Rams spent the entire second half struggling on offense while bending just enough on defense to preserve a tiny lead.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ahkello Witherspoon makes last-minute interception to preserve Rams' 13-9 win over Arizona

events.name: New York Jets at Buffalo Bills

headlines.description: — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Aidan O'Connell and the Las Vegas Raiders played with a lot of energy — and looked pretty sharp — for a last-place team that had every excuse to be sluggish and sleep-deprived.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brock Bowers sets NFL rookie records as the Raiders roll to a 25-10 victory over the Saints

events.name: Indianapolis Colts at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Snapping a franchise-record 10-game losing streak, winning for the first time at home this season and ending the Indianapolis Colts' slim playoff hopes Sunday didn't salvage the season for the New York Giants.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giants topple Colts 45-33 to eliminate Indy from the playoff race

headlines.description: — Nick Sirianni wore the hat given to NFC East champions as he sat at the podium and considered all the greatness that his Eagles still could accomplish this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East

events.name: Carolina Panthers at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers

headlines.description: — Whoever ends up coaching the Jacksonville Jaguars next season, receiver Brian Thomas Jr. will be the team's most dynamic rebuilding piece.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rookie Brian Thomas Jr. scores again as Jaguars beat Titans 20-13 for rare series sweep

headlines.description: — Tyler Huntley stepped in for Tua Tagovailoa and stepped up for the Dolphins.
headlines.shortLinkText: Huntley fills in for injured Tagovailoa, leads Dolphins past Browns 20-3 to keep playoff hopes alive

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Minnesota Vikings

headlines.description: — The Minnesota Vikings were ready to start their postgame ritual in honor of a ninth consecutive victory before realizing Sam Darnold was still missing from the <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Darnold gives Vikings another gem with career-high 377 yards in 27-25 win over Packers

headlines.description: — Jayden Daniels felt tired. Tired from a game that went well past 60 minutes. Tired from running all over the field for the better part of three-plus hours.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jayden Daniels dazzles again as Commanders clinch a playoff spot by beating Falcons 30-24 in OT

headlines.description: — The big prizes for the Detroit Lions remain on the horizon, with the team seeking a division title, the top seed in the NFC playoffs and the franchise's first Super Bowl trip.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lions beat the 49ers 40-34 in a tune-up for Week 18 division showdown
